reviews.review_description: NOW! I’m not telling you this because I’m a PROBOSCISS cc, but because of my experience. This game has the best community, mods, devs, and the owner, WOWVRR. It has an insane amount of possibilities in game that js NEVER get you bored! So I recommend you stop reading reviews and just play the game yourself, PEACE!!!

The owner is really really nice and the community is the best. I played it today and the people in the server plus the owner all hope that I do good at my run the challenge the owner does is really fun. I love the cosmetics in the game and I love how there’s different maps that you can explore and a weekly parkour that is really fun and the owner is really nice
The owner gives out infinite shells/￼ in game currency to people a lot. He should really make more fun games like this, and I hope he continues his job of developing.

reviews.review_title: I signed up for mod, but I still think i
reviews.review_description: I’m about to start this game and hopefully somebody teaches me how to play because I just saw it on YouTube that if I sign up for Mom, they’ll let us know if we’re mad so that’s what I did. I signed up an application

I was chillin in a public lobbie, when i saw a mod and talked about how i first got banned of something i did not do, and i said that the mod “leveldevil” got me banned and the mod got leveldevil in the lobbie to ban/jump me then i got banned.

developer_response.body:
Hey Ru_The_Raccoon! I’m sorry this happened. We try to keep moderation fair, and bans are not supposed to be based on drama or personal issues. We do only ban with vidoe evidence, but If you believe the ban was false, please submit a ban appeal in the Discord with your username and any proof/details so we can review it.

I’ll also look into the situation with the moderator mentioned, because staff should be handling reports professionally.

Thank you. God bless:)

reviews.review_description: The game itself is way better than most fan games, but I only dislike how there aren’t many people online

firstly this game is dead I logged on to play and there was only 2 players online in the entire game me and some other guy, also this game gives those gorilla tag cheap vibes if you know what I mean and lastly the mod packs basically ruin the game, you have people making very loud sounds or either flying around and it’s kinda annoying

developer_response.body:
Hey Epiker_Official! Thanks for the honest feedback, I appreciate you giving the game a try.
The player count is still growing, and we’re actively updating the game with new content to make it more fun and lively.
As for the mod pakcs and loud players, we’re improving our systems to keep the experience fair and enjoyable for everyone. It’s a work in progress, but we’re committed to making it better.
Thanks again for taking the time to share your thoughts! It really helps us improve the game:)

reviews.review_description: i was accused of saying the n word, and the owner wow, yeah wow, yeh the person who hates me for being framed on the n work in his discord, be carfull out there peoples

developer_response.body:
Hey Stuvvy! Thanks for the feedback.
 We try to keep moderation as fair as possible and review reports based on what evidence we have, not personal opinions. We do not allow slurs or harassment in the community, and actions are taken to keep Probosciss safe and welcoming for players. If you believe a moderation decision was wrong, you can contact us through the Discord report/appeal channels so we can review it again. Have a great day! God bless:)

developer_response.body:
Thanks for the review isaidfreeearme,DD! really appreciate you giving the game a try!
Player count is still growing, so some hours can be quieter than others, but we’re working on updates to bring more players in and keep lobbies active.
The cosmetic equip area is being improved too so it’s easier to find and use.
Glad you enjoyed the game overall! feedback like this helps us keep polishing it.

developer_response.body: Thanks for the feedback. I’m sorry the game felt confusing or cramped. Most cosmetics are optional and just for show, and I also try to keep prices affordable while still supporting future updates. We add different game modes to keep the game fun and fresh, and we’re always trying to make them as original as possible instead of just copying what other games do. I’ll also look into making horror mode instructions clearer and improving the layout so everything is easier to understand. Have a great day! God bless:) - WOW

developer_response.body: Hey IamGreedy! Thanks for checking out the game and sharing your thoughts. We know it’s not perfect yet. We’re still improving models, maps, and mechanics like swimming to make the experience smoother and more fun. Cosmetics and new content like weekly parkour is also being updated regularly. reviews.review_title: This game should have won GOTY.
reviews.review_description: PROBOSCIS is an absolute game-changer! Five stars doesn't do justice to the sheer brilliance of this monkey mayhem masterpiece. The thrill of tag has never been so engaging – from swinging through the jungle to strategic escapes, every moment is a wild adventure. The graphics are bananas good, and the multiplayer mode adds a hilarious twist to the primate pursuit. PROBOSCIS has set a new standard for gaming fun, making it the undisputed king of the jungle in the gaming world! I totally didn't use ChatGPT.
It's so good I think tinmehvrz is the best modarater
